---
title: Using edu-math in Google Colab
description: Install and use edu-math in cloud Python environments.
---

## Install

```python
pip install osl-incubator-edu-math
```

When working from a source checkout instead of a released package, install from
the repository root:

```python
pip install -e .
```

## Import Helpers

```python
from edumath.algebra import function_scene
from edumath.calculus.derivatives import derivative
from edumath.python_fundamentals import array_summary
```

## Plot in Colab

```python
scene = function_scene("x**2", x_min=-5, x_max=5, y_min=-2, y_max=25)
fig, ax = scene.render()
fig
```

## Notes

Browser-side Quarto widgets are designed for the documentation site. In Colab,
prefer the Python helpers and Matplotlib figures.
